hero_description: Frontend Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast building high-performance web experiences with a security-first mindset.
about_text: I am Mohamed Abdallah, a Mathematics and Computer Science student at the Faculty of Science, Suez University. I am passionate about Frontend Development, Cybersecurity, and building modern web applications. I enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and continuously improving my skills through real-world projects.

proj_1_desc: A modern responsive personal portfolio built using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Designed with Glassmorphism UI, reusable components, responsive layouts and clean architecture.
proj_2_desc: An academic presentation exploring bio-inspired artificial intelligence and wearable technology, highlighting intelligent systems, healthcare innovations and future AI applications.
